common.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
common.passwordComplexity: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.

login.title: Sign In
login.noAccount: Don't have an account yet? <signUpLink>Sign Up</signUpLink>

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sent: If that email has an account, we sent a reset link. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Choose a New Password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

register.title: Sign Up
register.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters.
register.agreeToTerms: I agree to the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
register.agreeToTermsRequired: Agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.
